offer: For property managers processing 10-50 properties, inconsistent maintenance schedules cause tenant complaints and property damage. We automate reminders instead of manual tracking.
problem: Inconsistent maintenance schedules lead to tenant complaints and property damage.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for property managers

Collect 10 short interviews from target users
